meaning: n.蜊｢譽ｮ蝣｡(谺ｧ豢ｲ隘ｿ驛ｨ螟ｧ蜈ｬ蝗ｽ)
examples: What time does the train reach Luxemburg ?
Luxemburg lies between France, Germany and Belgium.
He was speaking from Luxemburg but lives in exile in France.
Rhapsody is headquartered in Seattle, with offices in Frankfurt, London, Luxemburg, New York and San Francisco.
He has also overseen operations in Belgium, Switzerland and Luxemburg, and supervised operations in the Caribbean, Mexico, Puerto Rico, and Central and South America.
